_readme: Maps Aluffi's original numeric references (marked OLD... during the reference-cleanup pass) to the modern \label keys they resolve to via \Cref/\ref/\S{}\ref. Lets later chapters' stale cross-chapter refs (e.g. 'cf. Exercise I.2.10' or '[II.4.16]') be looked up instead of re-derived from the source PDF. Chapter numerals: I=prelims, II=groups, III=rings, IV=groups2, V=irreducibility, VI=linear_algebra, VII=fields, VIII=linear_reprise, IX=homological.

Example 3.3.label: exam:prelims:category-leq
Example 3.3.desc: relations as categories; already had this label

Example 2.5.desc: unlabeled: natural injections into disjoint union; not yet referenced by any hardcoded ref

Example 3.2.desc: unlabeled: Set is a category; not yet referenced by any hardcoded ref

Example 4.9.desc: unlabeled: monos/epis in Set are injective/surjective; not yet referenced

Example 4.10.desc: unlabeled: every morphism mono+epi in a \S3.3-style category; not yet referenced

groups._note: item_table position numbers (non-Exercise) are UNRELIABLE for anything not in the verified_items list above -- content in this rewrite has drifted from Aluffi's original numbering. Only use item positions from this file for keys explicitly listed; do not extrapolate.

linear_algebra._note: Item labels (Theorem/Proposition/Lemma/Corollary/Definition/Example) use the BARE pattern linalg:N.M with NO type prefix (unlike irred:N.M which is prop:irred:N.M etc) -- verified against pdfs/Chapter 6*.txt.

Exercise 1.10.desc: referenced from prelims.tex exer:3.1 bracket; homological.tex not yet audited for numeric exercise labels

fields._note: Item labels use prop/thm/lem/coro/defn:fields:N.M (type-prefixed, like irred). Example labels use the doubled pattern exam:fields:exam:N.M specifically -- verified against pdfs/Chapter 7*.txt. Exercise labels are ordered fields:exer:N.M (reversed from the usual exer:fields:N.M).

irreducibility._note: Item labels (Proposition/Lemma/Theorem/Corollary/Definition/Example) mostly follow the pattern <prefix>:irred:N.M directly (prop/lem/thm/coro/defn/exam), matching Aluffi's numbering by construction -- verified against pdfs/Chapter 5*.txt. Check for that label directly before doing a fresh PDF lookup.

_uncertain.note: groups2.tex cites this for "f.g. abelian groups are products of cyclic groups", but groups.tex §6.3 (item position) is just the definition of finitely generated -- no content match found. Likely a genuinely stale/mis-numbered reference (may have meant a later chapter, e.g. linear_algebra.tex’s classification theorem). Left flagged in groups2.tex as UNCERTAIN:Example II.6.3 rather than guessed.

rings._note: Backfilled 2026-07-09 after discovering this key was entirely missing despite the chapter being fully audited -- item entries are the subset actually needed by later chapters so far, not exhaustive. Add more as cross-chapter refs into this chapter come up.
